headline: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
summary: Regional banking company KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 6.7% year on year to $1.96 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.44 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
